headline: Is Arista Networks (ANET) a Solid Growth Stock? 3 Reasons to Think "Yes"

headline: Veteran analyst upgrades Arista stock price on AI demand surge
summary: Wall Street rarely changes its mind twice on the same stock within three weeks. With Arista Networks (ANET), it just did. On May 15, a bullish call flipped Arista from a stock investors had been quietly trimming over customer concentration fears into one of the cleaner AI infrastructure plays ...

headline: Arista Networks (ANET) Is Considered a Good Investment by Brokers: Is That True?
summary: Based on the average brokerage recommendation (ABR), Arista Networks (ANET) should be added to one's portfolio. Wall Street analysts' overly optimistic recommendations cast doubt on the effectiveness of this highly sought-after metric. So, is the stock worth buying?
